definitions.en: A word used to indicate that an action has been completed or has already happened.
definitions.vi: Từ dùng để chỉ một hành động đã hoàn thành hoặc đã xảy ra.

exampleSentences: Anh uống nước cam tươi rồi.
notes:
rồi usually means “already.” It shows that something is finished or has happened.

Put rồi at the end of a clause to mark completion.  

It can also mean “then/after that” to show sequence: do this first, rồi do the next thing.

For negatives, use chưa instead (chưa = not yet), which is the natural opposite in meaning.
sentenceBreakdowns: Anh (he) + uống (drink) + nước cam tươi (orange juice) + rồi (already)
Chị (she) + xem (watch) + phim đó (that movie) + rồi (already)
notes_md:
**rồi** usually means **“already.”** It shows that something is finished or has happened.

Put **rồi** at the end of a clause to mark completion.  

It can also mean **“then/after that”** to show sequence: do this first, rồi do the next thing.

For negatives, use **chưa** instead (chưa = not yet), which is the natural opposite in meaning.
